metadata.description: v2 quick shopping search. Trusts each site's native ordering (top-3 per site), groups cross-site results with a cheap LLM call, synthesises reviews per group, renders reviews-first Telegram cards. Escalates to shopping_v2 if no products.

steps.name: resolve_candidates
steps.title: Resolve Candidates
steps.instruction: Step name: resolve_candidates. Calls the shopping_search fleet, keeps top-3 per site, no filtering. Stores candidates in search_results.

steps.name: group_and_synthesize
steps.title: Group & Synthesize Reviews
steps.instruction: Step name: group_and_synthesize. LLM groups candidates across sites, drops accessories, synthesises reviews per kept group (max 2).
steps.done_when: grouped_synth.cards contains one Telegram card per kept group.

steps.name: format_response
steps.title: Format & Deliver Response
steps.instruction: Step name: format_response. Joins grouped_synth.cards into a single Telegram message.
